creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #2)

Hi Lorenzo,

Now I see that Antoine ran exp-run on 12. This failure is indeed a new failure on 12 but it was triggered by this port's update, not by GCC_DEFAULT.

The appropriate BROKEN line has been added.

I am closing this bug since it was just a false positive in the exp-run.


Yuri
